name: Hot and Sour Cabbage
recipeInstructions:
1. Separate, wash, and dry the cabbage leaves.
2. Stack them and cut crosswise into 1-inch wide pieces.
3. Finely mince or grind Szechuan peppercorns.
4. Crush rock sugar with a cleaver handle; mix with soy sauce and set aside.
5. Heat the wok to moderate heat, then add oil.
6. Wait for 30 seconds before stirring-frying whole chili peppers until they just blacken.
7. Quickly add peppercorns. When they release their pungent odor, push them to the side of the wok and raise the heat to high.
8. Add salt and cabbage all at once. Toss the cabbage until it is wilted and soft (about 2 tablespoons of water should remain in the wok when the cabbage is wilted).
9. Add the sugar and soy sauce mixture. Once the sugar has melted, toss with the cabbage.
10. Sprinkle vinegar over everything and continue tossing on high heat for another 20 seconds.
11. Add sesame oil and toss briefly before transferring to a serving dish.
12. If serving cold, allow it to cool, then cover and refrigerate.
